description.en: A raise statement. exc is the exception object to be raised, normally a Call or Name, or None for a standalone raise. cause is the optional part for y in raise x from y. >>> print(ast.dump(ast.parse('raise x from y'), indent=4)) Module( body=[ Raise( exc=Name(id='x', ctx=Load()), cause=Name(id='y', ctx=Load()))])
